title: Compact Classic Computer Badge
review_note: Strongest literal classic-computer read; clean dot anchor; more object-icon than abstract badge.
risk: May feel too literal if the final site mark needs to stay very minimal.

title: Rounded Beige Terminal Icon
review_note: Cleanest rounded terminal treatment; visible grid cue; good black-dot continuity.
risk: Slightly less distinctive silhouette than variant 1 or 3.

title: Playful Retro Desktop Emblem
review_note: Most badge-like and clearest CS/circuit signal; fun hero-mark energy.
risk: Busier than the portfolio system and includes a small rainbow-like block that should be removed or redrawn if selected.
